overview: revAlife is a premium Indian wellness e-commerce platform with 10 science-backed products (Ashwagandha, Moringa, Triphala, and more), complete shopping cart, UPI/COD payments, admin panel, AI Health Assistant, and full order management.
features: 10 Indian wellness products with INR pricing
Right-side slide-in cart drawer with quantity controls
User login via clean in-site modal (Flipkart-style)
My Orders with Cancel, Return, Replace actions
Admin panel with product/order management and analytics
Responsive mobile-first design with green/white premium UI
All legal and informational footer pages
